summary: Brand Identity Integration testing completed successfully. All 'Signal Intelligence System' lockup text appears correctly on auth pages, dashboard, landing page footer, and navigation. Login flow works with test credentials.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - endpoint not found, but /api/ root works correctly

passed_tests: Login page (/login) shows AuthBrandLockup with 'AlphaAI' title and 'SIGNAL INTELLIGENCE SYSTEM' subtitle
Register page (/register) shows AuthBrandLockup with 'AlphaAI' title and 'SIGNAL INTELLIGENCE SYSTEM' subtitle
Forgot Password page (/forgot-password) shows AuthBrandLockup with branding
Reset Password page (/reset-password?token=test) shows brand lockup with 'SIGNAL INTELLIGENCE SYSTEM'
Dashboard page (/dashboard) shows 'Powered by the AlphaAI Signal Intelligence System' tag
Landing page (/) hero section shows brand lockup with 'SIGNAL INTELLIGENCE SYSTEM'
Landing page footer has brand lockup with 'SIGNAL INTELLIGENCE SYSTEM' subtitle
Landing page footer has 'Powered by the AlphaAI Signal Intelligence System' tag
Login flow works correctly with credentials: demo_test2@my-alpha-ai.com / NewPass1234!
critical_code_review_comments: AuthBrandLockup component correctly implemented in AuthPages.jsx with data-testid='auth-brand-lockup'
BrandLockup component in App.js supports 'default', 'stacked', and 'inline' variants with showSubtitle prop
PoweredByTag component correctly placed on Dashboard (line 2194) and Landing page footer (line 713)
All 4 email templates (verification, password reset, welcome pro, 2FA enabled) have 'Signal Intelligence System' subtitle and 'Powered by' footer
context_for_next_testing_agent: Brand identity integration complete. All auth pages (Login, Register, Forgot Password, Reset Password) show AuthBrandLockup with 'AlphaAI' and 'SIGNAL INTELLIGENCE SYSTEM'. Dashboard has PoweredByTag before popup modals. Landing page footer has both BrandLockup (stacked variant with subtitle) and PoweredByTag. Email templates have 'Signal Intelligence System' subtitle under headers and 'Powered by AlphaAI Signal Intelligence System' in footers.

mocked_apis_list: Push notification delivery logs to console only
